---
title: "Repository Layout"
description: "Find OPALX, legacy OPAL, IPPL, tests, and fetched dependencies in a development checkout."
audience: developer
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

| Path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `opalx/src/` | OPALX application and parser-facing implementation. |
| `opal/opal/src/` | Separate historical OPAL source retained in the wider project. |
| `ippl/ippl/src/` | Standalone IPPL source in a combined development workspace. |
| `tests/` | OPALX test cases where present in the enclosing project. |
| `build*/_deps/ippl-src/` | IPPL source fetched for a particular OPALX build. |
| `unit_tests/` | Unit-test executables inside a configured build. |

When diagnosing behavior, inspect the IPPL checkout actually used by the build
under `_deps`, not an unrelated sibling clone. Keep build directories separate
for serial, OpenMP, CUDA, and HIP configurations so cached platform settings do
not leak between backends.
